summary: Selected Consultant theme (light blue/white, corporate/professional) with generate mode, professional/analytical tone, targeting startup founders. Medium detail level with 10 cards and no AI-generated images to maintain focus on data. Unlisted visibility for controlled sharing.
notes_for_orchestrator: Theme selection prioritized credibility and data clarity over visual flair. Decision to use 'images: none' is intentional—can regenerate with subtle AI images if V wants more visual appeal. Alternative professional themes considered: Chimney Smoke (elegant grayscale), Gleam (sophisticated gray), Founder (minimalist dark). Consultant won for its explicit consulting/consultant positioning and clean color hierarchy that won't compete with assessment data.
